answer: 1. To identify molecular subtypes of endometrial cancer using a combination of genomic and transcriptomic approaches. 2. To investigate the clinical and biological significance of the identified molecular subtypes, including their association with patient outcomes and response to therapy. 3. To develop biomarkers for the early detection and prognosis of endometrial cancer based on the identified molecular subtypes.
